from dotnet_ai_kit.models import DetectionSignal, DetectionScoreCard, DetectedProject
s = DetectionSignal\(pattern_name='Aggregate base', signal_type='code-pattern', target_project_type='command', confidence='high', weight=3, evidence='test.cs:10'\)
print\(f'Signal: {s.pattern_name} -> {s.target_project_type} \({s.confidence}\)'\)
sc = DetectionScoreCard\(project_type='command', positive_score=9.0, negative_score=1.0, net_score=8.0, signal_count=3\)
print\(f'Score: {sc.project_type} net={sc.net_score}'\)
p = DetectedProject\(mode='microservice', project_type='hybrid', confidence='high', confidence_score=0.92\)
print\(f'Project: {p.project_type} conf={p.confidence} score={p.confidence_score}'\)
print\('All models OK'\)
")

import typer
from typer.testing import CliRunner
app = typer.Typer\(\)
import sys

@app.command\(\)
def test_cmd\(\):
    print\('stdout message'\)
    print\('stderr message', file=sys.stderr\)

runner = CliRunner\(\)
result = runner.invoke\(app, []\)
print\('output:', repr\(result.output\)\)
print\('has stderr_bytes:', hasattr\(result, 'stderr_bytes'\)\)
print\('has stderr:', hasattr\(result, 'stderr'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\dotnet-ai-kit" && python -c "
from pathlib import Path
from dotnet_ai_kit.detection import detect_project, DetectionError
import os

projects_dir = Path\(r'C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\projects'\)
for p in sorted\(projects_dir.iterdir\(\)\):
    if not p.is_dir\(\):
        continue
    try:
        result = detect_project\(p\)
        signals = '  |  '.join\(f'{s[\\"pattern_name\\"]} \({s[\\"confidence\\"]}\)' for s in result.top_signals\)
        print\(f'{p.name}'\)
        print\(f'  Type: {result.project_type} \({result.mode}\)'\)
        print\(f'  Confidence: {result.confidence} \({int\(result.confidence_score*100\)}%\)'\)
        print\(f'  Signals: {signals}'\)
        print\(\)
    except DetectionError as e:
        print\(f'{p.name}'\)
        print\(f'  ERROR: {e}'\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\dotnet-ai-kit" && python -c "
from pathlib import Path
from dotnet_ai_kit.detection import detect_project, _collect_signals, _score_candidates

root = Path\(r'C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\projects\\Anis.competition-commands'\)
csproj_files = list\(root.rglob\('*.csproj'\)\)
signals = _collect_signals\(root, csproj_files\)
cards = _score_candidates\(signals\)
for ptype, card in sorted\(cards.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1].net_score, reverse=True\):
    print\(f'{ptype:<15} pos={card.positive_score:.0f} neg={card.negative_score:.0f} net={card.net_score:.0f} signals={card.signal_count}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Query-sql signals:'\)
for s in signals:
    if s.target_project_type == 'query-sql':
        neg = ' [NEG]' if s.is_negative else ''
        print\(f'  {s.pattern_name} \({s.confidence}\){neg}: {s.evidence[:80]}'\)
")
